feed.title: Lumi Studio — one independent iOS app guide daily
feed.subtitle: A low-frequency rotation across every currently public Lumi Studio app.

entry.title: G+Money — independent iOS app guide
entry.content:
Today's Lumi Studio app guide: G+Money. Track expenses and convert currencies in a simple offline budgeting flow. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Budgeting #TravelFinance #iOSApps
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755782939
entry.summary: Today's Lumi Studio app guide: G+Money. Track expenses and convert currencies in a simple offline budgeting flow. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Budgeting #TravelFinance #iOSApps App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755782939
